summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NumStore MVP - digital products e-commerce platform. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with minor cart persistence issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Cart items not persisting between page navigations
ui_bugs.details: Cart shows items correctly when navigated to immediately after adding, but becomes empty on subsequent visits. Likely a localStorage/session management issue.

passed_tests: Products API (get all, filter by category, get specific)
Admin stats endpoint with all required fields
Home page loading with products catalog
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix cart state persistence issue - cart items are not maintained between page navigations. Check localStorage/sessionStorage implementation in CartContext.
